title: jurinella subacaulis
intro: Jurinella subacaulis, also known as the yellow flag or yellow iris, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Iridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Jurinella subacaulis include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in the treatment of urinary issues. Herbal preparations of Jurinella subacaulis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
